data: study replay: Grok Go first autonomous loop booted from Terminal watcher
failure mode: GUI injection could switch Terminal tabs but did not reliably place text into Grok input
mitigation: watcher wrote next-autonomous-prompt.txt and copied the prompt with pbcopy
manual bridge: ~/.grok/go became the reliable low-friction continuation path
git memory: repeated commits captured watcher banners, continuation helpers, shell fallback, and session-guide changes
observed pathology: the loop started maintaining its own continuation machinery more than advancing high-leverage goals
research package: Gemini and Grok exports converted into working-paper notes and terrarium source artifacts
terrarium mode: website replays the first loop as study data while live telemetry stays read-only
